Home/Palm supply and delivery, planned properly.

From nursery to destination

Palm supply and delivery, planned properly.

A reliable delivery plan starts with the correct palm specification, quantity, destination and site-access information—not a generic transport estimate.

Request delivery assessment →
StockConfirmed at enquiry stage
Delivery quoteBased on size, quantity and city
CollectionRoadside collection listed
OriginKhairpur Mirs

What buyers need to know

01

Supply confirmation

Current stock, variety and height should be confirmed before transport is planned.

  • Current imagery
  • Variety and quantity
  • Height specification
02

Transport planning

Palm size and root preparation influence the appropriate vehicle and handling process.

  • Route and distance
  • Loading requirements
  • Safe support and protection
03

Destination readiness

Access, unloading area and planting preparation should be reviewed before dispatch.

  • Vehicle access
  • Unloading space
  • Prepared planting area
